narrative_beat: Profeta violeta-azul cercado de chamas douradas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid prophet Daniel in violet-blue tunic with golden sash standing erect with wide eyes of revelation holding forbidden text scroll surrounded by golden flames and smoke in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: Daniel's wide eyes of revelation and the forbidden text scroll
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated technology research center with dark screens and inert equipment in background

environment.location: intersection of ancient prophecy and modern research

mood.emotion: Daniel seeing the fourth kingdom fulfilled in silicon

symbolism.primary: the prophet who named the fourth beast seeing it rise in data centers
symbolism.secondary: forbidden text as knowledge reserved for our generation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
